app/main.js.reason: The application initial-static closure is held to its exact current footprint while feature controllers remain behind explicit lazy boundaries.

background/service-worker.js.reason: The Chromium service-worker initial-static closure is ratcheted separately from the larger Firefox fallback entry.

background/firefox-background.js.reason: The Firefox document-background entry includes its content fallback loader, so its exact static cost is tracked as a distinct browser budget.

app/pocket/controller.js.reason: Pocket remains an explicit runtime-owned lazy controller and this budget tracks only modules added beyond the application initial-static closure.

app/settings/controller.js.reason: Settings remains an explicit runtime-owned lazy controller and its comparatively broad incremental module closure is independently ratcheted.

app/summary/controller.js.reason: Summary remains an explicit runtime-owned lazy controller and this budget tracks only modules added beyond the application initial-static closure.
